TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Baron_Waqa, title = Baron_Waqa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Baron_Waqa} }

S.FORM: I 1959 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 31 a romi'ad masofoc ci Baron Waqa , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Nauru anini i ci Baron Waqa, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 11 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~b~varo~un wa*a , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u nao~u~uro~u~u anini i ¶i b~b~varo~un wa*a, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. kaso~ufo~u ¶an a …ĺo~uma ° **** …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ ** sa…ĺikaka **** nataja…ĺan ** pito~uo~uran **
S.FORM: I 1959 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 31 a romi'ad masofoc ci Baron Waqa , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Nauru anini i ci Baron Waqa, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 11 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
